## Checklist

- [ ] I removed secrets, credentials, personal data, and customer data.
- [ ] I updated relevant documentation or explained why no docs change is needed.
- [ ] I preserved the Community/Cloud/Enterprise boundary.
- [ ] I documented migration, release, or external-setting actions, or marked them not applicable.
